allow: Bash(mysql -h localhost -P 3306 -u root -e "USE book_mall; SHOW CREATE TABLE \\`user\\`;")

Bash(mysql -h localhost -P 3306 -u root -e "SELECT LENGTH\('系统管理员'\) AS len, CHAR_LENGTH\('系统管理员'\) AS char_len;")

Bash(mysql -h localhost -P 3306 -u root -e "USE book_mall; INSERT INTO \\`user\\` \(\\`username\\`, \\`password\\`, \\`nickname\\`, \\`phone\\`, \\`email\\`, \\`role\\`, \\`status\\`\) VALUES \('admin', '$2a$10$N.zmdr9k7uOCQb376NoUnuTJ8iAt6Z5EHsM8lE9lBOsl7iKLU.yvC', '系统管理员', '13800138000', 'admin@bookmall.com', 1, 1\);")
Bash(mysql -h localhost -P 3306 -u root -e "USE book_mall; SHOW TABLES;")
Bash(mysql -h localhost -P 3306 -u root -e "USE book_mall; SELECT username, nickname, role, status FROM \\`user\\` ORDER BY id;")

Bash(mysql --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -h localhost -P 3306 -u root -e 'USE book_mall; UPDATE `user` SET nickname="系统管理员" WHERE username="admin"; UPDATE `user` SET nickname="测试用户" WHERE username="testuser";')
Bash(mysql --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -h localhost -P 3306 -u root -e 'USE book_mall; SELECT username, nickname, role, status FROM `user` ORDER BY id;')
Bash(mysql -h localhost -P 3306 -u root -e "USE book_mall; SELECT id, username, password, role, status FROM \\`user\\` WHERE username='admin';")
Bash(mysql -h localhost -P 3306 -u root -e 'USE book_mall; SELECT id, username, password, role, status FROM `user` WHERE username="admin";')
Bash(mysql -h "localhost" -P "3306" -u "root" "book_mall" -e "SELECT id, username, password FROM user WHERE username LIKE 'addr_test_%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;")

Bash(python - <<'PY'
import bcrypt
hash=b"$2a$10$N.zmdr9k7uOCQb376NoUnuTJ8iAt6Z5EHsM8lE9lBOsl7iKLU.yvC"
for pw in [b'admin123', b'user123', b'test123', b'123456', b'password']:
    print\(pw, bcrypt.checkpw\(pw, hash\)\)
PY)
